text:
はぁ、はぁ……
ようやく終わったぁ。

わかりきったことだけど
前衛って、たいへんだね。

でも、きみだっていきなり
強くなったわけじゃないもんね。

それは、新人だった頃を見てる
あたしが一番よく知ってるもんね……

……また頑張ろうっと！
さ、帰還しましょう。

It's not really news at this point, but wow,
holding down the front line is never easy, is
it?

Practice makes perfect though, huh?
I don't suppose you were just born as
strong as you are now either.

I know you weren't. I watched you grow with
my own two eyes, after all.

Right, then! Less whining, more training! Let's
head on back then, shall we?
